经济.title: Iran and Oman drafting protocol to 'monitor' Hormuz Strait traffic: IRNA
经济.summary: The Strait of Hormuz, the vital artery for global oil transit, has been effectively closed since the U.S.-Israel war on Iran started in late February.

经济.title: Trump administration prepares up to 100% pharmaceutical tariffs on some imported drugs
经济.summary: The Trump administration is preparing to impose new tariffs on drugmakers that have not struck deals with the president to lower their U.S. drug prices.

经济.title: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
经济.summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.

经济.title: Oil prices soar 13% as Trump's Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
经济.summary: Oil surged as Trump in his address to the nation on Iran war said that he expected the conflict to last another two to three weeks.

经济.title: Tesla reports 358,000 first-quarter vehicle deliveries, down 14% from last quarter
经济.summary: Tesla is coming off a year of declining deliveries due in part to increased competition from rivals in China offering lower-cost models.
